strategic_objective: Investigate the nature and implications of low diversity and near-constant behavior in bulk traffic features to discern genuine patterns from artifacts.
key_checks: Check cardinality and value distribution stability of bulk features across time and classes
Evaluate if low diversity masks intra-class variation or temporal dynamics
Explore potential data collection or preprocessing artifacts influencing feature saturation
success_criteria: Established whether low diversity is consistent with genuine network behavior or artifact
Detected any meaningful intra-class or temporal variation despite low cardinality
Identified structural or procedural causes for near-constant feature values
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope for bulk traffic features
